title: Visium Direct Mount FFPE v3 -- University of Minnesota TMCs
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"7c0p0","text":"The Visium Spatial Gene Expression for FFPE is designed to measure mRNA in tissue sections derived","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"d6cdj","text":"from formalin fixed \u0026 paraffin embedded (FFPE) tissue samples and requires a Visium Spatial slide","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"76knk","text":"with intact tissue sections as input. ","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"mubc","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"9tloc","text":"Tissue sections are processed with Visium Spatial Gene Expression assay performed by the University of Minnesota Imaging Center and sequenced by the University of Minnesota Genomics Center.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"eubvp","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"f02p4","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: CG000407_VisiumSpatialGeneExpressionforFFPE_UserGuide_RevE.pdf Sequencer: Illumina NovaSeq 6000 using read format 28/10/10/50
BCL data from Illumina sequencer is demultiplexed and converted into FASTQ format using bcl2fastq software version 2.20.0
creator: Allie Abdellatif
